overall.description: A first-person perspective walk along a stormy waterfront in a video game environment, likely Red Dead Redemption 2. The camera moves steadily along a muddy shore past wooden shacks on stilts, with heavy rain falling, lightning flashing, and distant ships visible through the haze.

segments.scene_description: Walking along an exposed muddy shoreline during a heavy storm. Power lines run parallel on the right while open water stretches to the left under dark, lightning-filled clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: open bay with distant shipping vessels

events.description: distant sailing ships with tall masts become visible on the horizon through the rain

agents.ego_description: continuing along the shore as the view opens to reveal distant ships anchored in the bay

entered.detail: tall masts of sailing ships visible through the storm haze on the water
small wooden structures barely visible through the rain on the distant shore

segments.scene_description: The shoreline curves revealing a wider view of the bay where distant sailing ships are anchored. The rain continues to fall heavily across the open water as the camera moves toward the dock area.

scene_state.functional_zone: weathered wooden dock shacks on stilts

agents.ego_description: walking past abandoned wooden shacks and scattered dock debris along the water's edge

wooden dock structures extending into the water with mooring posts
elevated water tank visible behind the dock buildings
broken wooden crates and trash scattered along the muddy ground

segments.scene_description: Passing by weathered wooden shacks built on stilts along the muddy shore. The area shows signs of abandonment with scattered debris, dilapidated dock structures, and a water tower visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a storm-lashed shoreline that transitions from an open, exposed coast to a dilapidated settlement of stilt houses. It begins by tracking along a muddy bank under dark, lightning-filled clouds, with power lines running parallel to the churning water on the left. As the shoreline curves, the view expands to reveal a wide bay where distant sailing ships are anchored amidst the heavy rainfall. The camera then pushes forward toward the dock area, shifting from the open coast to a cluster of weathered wooden shacks built on stilts. Finally, the scene passes through an abandoned landscape of scattered debris and dilapidated structures, with a lone water tower looming in the background.
